title: UCIL – Graduate Operational Trainee – 4 Posts

basic_details.job_title: UCIL GOT Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Graduate Operational Trainee Posts
basic_details.short_information: Uranium Corporation of India (UCIL) has recruits 04 Graduate Operational Trainee Posts. Candidates With B.Sc Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 24-04-2026, and closes on 23-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through UCIL website, uraniumcorp.in.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. (Chemistry) - 3 years course OR B.Sc. (Chemistry Honours) with Physics and Mathematics as subsidiary subjects.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the UCIL Graduate Operational Trainee (CR&D) Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: Uranium Corporation of India Graduate Operational Trainee (CR&D) Recruitment 2026
